common_params.name: partner_id
common_params.description: Partner ID is assigned upon registration is successful. Required for all requests.

common_params.name: timestamp
common_params.description: This is to indicate the timestamp of the request. Required for all requests. Expires in 5 minutes.

common_params.name: access_token
common_params.description: The token for API access, using to identify your permission to the api. Valid for multiple use and expires in 4 hours.

common_params.name: shop_id
common_params.description: Shopee's unique identifier for a shop. Required param for most APIs.

common_params.name: sign
common_params.description: Signature generated by partner_id, api path, timestamp, access_token, shop_id and partner_key via HMAC-SHA256 hashing algorithm. More details: https://open.shopee.com/documents?module=87&type=2&id=58&version=2

define: Use this api to initiate logistics including arrange pickup, dropoff or shipment for non-integrated logistic channels. Should call v2.logistics.get_shipping_parameter to fetch all required param first. It's recommended to initiate logistics one hour after the orders were placed.

request_params.name: order_sn
request_params.description: Shopee's unique identifier for an order.

request_params.name: package_number
request_params.description: Shopee's unique identifier for the package under an order. You should't fill the field with empty string when there is't a package number.

request_params.name: pickup

children.name: address_id
children.description: The identity of address. Retrieved from v2.logistics.get_shipping_parameter.

children.name: pickup_time_id
children.description:
The pickup time id. Retrieved from v2.logistics.get_shipping_parameter, you can only select one from the time_slot_list. 


Some logistics channels may not return any date or time for pickup time slots. In such cases, sellers can arrange shipment without selecting any time slot, and Shopee will arrange a suitable timing for these situations.

children.name: tracking_number
children.description: Need input this field when "tracking_number" is returned from "info_need". Please note that this tracking number is assigned by third-party shipping carrier for item shipment.

request_params.description: Required parameter ONLY if get_shipping_parameter returns "pickup" under "info_needed". Developer should still include "pickup" field in the call even if "pickup" has empty value.

request_params.name: dropoff

children.name: tracking_number
children.description: Need input this field when "tracking_number" is returned from "info_need". Please note that this tracking number is assigned by third-party shipping carrier for item shipment.

children.name: slug
children.description: The selected 3PL partner to drop-off parcels with.

request_params.description: Required parameter ONLY if get_shipping_parameter returns "dropoff" under "info_needed". Developer should still include "dropoff" field in the call even if "dropoff" has empty value. For logistic_id 80003 and 80004, both Regular and JOB shipping methods are supported. If you choose Regular shipping method, please use "tracking_no" to call Init API. If you choose JOB shipping method, please use "sender_real_name" to call Init API. Note that only one of "tracking_no" and "sender_real_name" can be selected.

request_params.name: non_integrated

children.name: tracking_number
children.description: Optional parameter for non-integrated channel order. The tracking number assigned by the shipping carrier for item shipment.

request_params.description: Optional parameter when get_shipping_parameter returns "non-integrated" under "info_needed".

response_params.name: request_id
response_params.description: The identifier for an API request for error tracking.

response_params.name: error
response_params.description: Indicate error type if hit error. Empty if no error happened.

response_params.name: message
response_params.description: Indicate error details if hit error. Empty if no error happened.

request_sample.value:
<?php

$curl = curl_init();

curl_setopt_array($curl, array(
  CURLOPT_URL => 'https://partner.shopeemobile.com/api/v2/logistics/ship_order?access_token=access_token&partner_id=partner_id&shop_id=shop_id&sign=sign&timestamp=timestamp',
  CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
  CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
  CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
  CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
  CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
  CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
  CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'POST',
  CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS => '{
    "order_sn": "201212DCXHJUIKJ",
    "package_number": "",
    "pickup": {
        "address_id": 0,
        "pickup_time_id": "",
        "tracking_number": ""
    }
}',
  CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => array(
    'Content-Type: application/json'
  ),
));

$response = curl_exec($curl);

curl_close($curl);
echo $response;

update_log_list.content: Updated description to indicate the order_status logic of BR Seller Logistics channel (logistics_channel_id: 90021) and BR Instant Delivery channel (logistics_channel_id: 90026)
update dropoff slug for TW OK-SPX

value.message: Parameter sender_real_name can not be null.
